title: Creatures of SonariaCraft
description: This fan mod adds over 40 creatures to your Minecraft world! Each creature has a unique design and behavior inspired by the game Creatures of Sonaria. Tame them, farm them, battle them...whatever you want! That is up to you!
body:
This fan mod adds over 70 creatures to your Minecraft world! Each creature has a unique design and behavior inspired by the game Creatures of Sonaria. Tame them, farm them, battle them...whatever you want! That is up to you!

**Live document with further information about the creatures and mod**

 https://docs.google.com/document/d/15SFpARlpwK95uZIRw5hB7fplwX-qp1DslEYFdwF_XRE/edit?usp=sharing

**Want to leave a suggestion?**

 https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfjLOJZDXMAZ9F4dwQT2L6DZV9QsC45VSsKnJlpVI6uJPi4LA/viewform?usp=dialog

**Want to become a creature?** 

You can with Remorphed. There are some limitations, but you'll manage.

**Creatures**

Pero, Brequwek, Rorolo, Puffwump, Minawii, Phyremia, Shro, Wixpectr'o, Kriffin, Saukyurn, Aereis, Olatua, Cottol, Ani, Sturbi, Kabuti, Boreal Warden, Angelic Warden, Ikoran, Korathos, Koryser, Adharcaiin, Hellion Warden, Jotunhel, Axothan, Demetyra, Kiridian, Jeff, Verdant Warden, Hisolidium, Eulopii, Buff Eulopii, Moonelle, Karakro, Beezu, Garra Warden, Coniferon, Mijusuima, Valkurse, Aesho, Luxsces, Cimmabu, Vaumora, Golgaroth, Fellisio, Gorgonichus, Squitico, Laibonich, Yohsog, Undoli, Ardor Warden, Oxytalis, Nymphasuchus,  Doragonix, Eigion Warden, Koipise, Kiiwin, Yenyasha, Gnolrok, Keruku, Reverbelle, Diesura, Qurugosk, Kriprik, Nimoona, Kavourdis, Hallucinix, Idrabark, Sochuri, Felifaux, Athulyth, Turgeon, Hebotia, Avrokan, Xeneles, Banpi-Banpi, Nightmyth, Paru-Gama Magnacetus, Lactarim, Bazelii, Gurava, Salrahn, Kendyll, Pliarys, Saikarie, Nytoltalus, Malupiscis, Euvias, Lmakosaurodon, Denjzi, Zhelijin, and Volnoirve.



 

All creature designs and concepts belong to Sonar Studios/Twin Atlas

Click here to play Creatures of Sonaria: https://www.roblox.com/games/5233782396/Creatures-of-Sonaria-Survive-Kaiju-Animals

 

 

 

**Dependencies**

Geckolib is a dependency! The mod will NOT work without it.

JEI is recommended to look up crafting recipes

Remorphed is recommended for players who want to survive/roleplay as a creature.

 

 

**Notes**


Hostile mobs will not target you if you play in peaceful mode

This mod will be maintained for as long as I reasonably can. This is a hobby. I earn no money from it. Soon enough, I will become too busy to maintain it. 

This is the first mod I have ever made. This is just something I did because I was really bored. It is not perfect, there are issues, and it will be improved upon as my skills improve :)

 

**Known Issues**


1. Command Stick not working in multiplayer after 30+ min
Solution for now: Restart the server

 

 

**Credits**

My Brother (coding)

Cinema (Aereis Meat Textures): https://www.instagram.com/cinema_posts/ 

N0FILE (Laibonich, Felifaux, Athulyth, Doragonix, Kendyll model, texture, and animation): https://www.youtube.com/@n0file778

croc2133 (Miju edits and carcass model)

Friend's Kid: Sonarite armor & tool models, textures, & sprites
